headline: v0.1.5 — Voice subsystem scaffolded; multi-provider LLM expansion shipped
narrative: AgentZero Lite reached v0.1.5 with two simultaneous expansions on the same foundation. The LLM layer went from a single local Gemma-4 to five backends (local Gemma, local Nemotron Nano 8B, Webnori, OpenAI, LM Studio, Ollama) behind one OpenAI-compatible interface. The modality layer grew a voice — STT/TTS scaffolded with a Voice tab, dual-VAD mic capture, mute-while-playing feedback suppression, and a default loop that runs end-to-end on Win11 OS-level voices for $0/month. Both expansions slot behind already-named interfaces (ILlmProvider, ISpeechToText, ITextToSpeech) — the agent grows by adding implementations, not new shells.

highlights.label: Multi-provider
highlights.text: 5 LLM backends behind one HTTP interface

highlights.label: Voice scaffold
highlights.text: STT × 4 / TTS × 2, free Win11 OS-voice loop

prompts.text: Open Claude and Codex side by side, then route a message between them
Talk to the Claude tab — first-contact handshake, then start the conversation
Voice in (Whisper.net) → local Gemma → voice out (Win11 SAPI Korean neural)
